examples.title: Algorithm: Fourier Transform
examples.description: Pseudocode for the Fourier Transform algorithm
examples.code:
ALGORITHM FourierTransform
INPUT: Image matrix f(x,y)
OUTPUT: Frequency domain representation F(u,v)

BEGIN
  FOR each pixel (x,y) in the image
    FOR each frequency component (u,v)
      F(u,v) = (1/MN) * ΣΣ f(x,y)e^(-j2π(ux/M + vy/N))
    END FOR
  END FOR
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the Fourier Transform algorithm, which converts an image from its spatial domain representation to its frequency domain representation.

examples.title: Python: Fourier Transform
examples.description: Python implementation of the Fourier Transform algorithm using NumPy
examples.code:
import numpy as np

# Read image
img = np.random.rand(256, 256)

# Apply Fourier Transform
f = np.fft.fft2(img)
fshift = np.fft.fftshift(f)

# Create low-pass filter mask
rows, cols = img.shape
crow, ccol = rows//2, cols//2
mask = np.zeros((rows, cols), np.uint8)
mask[crow-30:crow+30, ccol-30:ccol+30] = 1

# Apply mask and inverse DFT
fshift = fshift * mask
f_ishift = np.fft.ifftshift(fshift)
img_back = np.fft.ifft2(f_ishift)
img_back = np.abs(img_back)
examples.explanation: This Python code demonstrates the Fourier Transform algorithm using NumPy. It applies the Fourier Transform to an image, creates a low-pass filter mask, and applies the mask to the frequency domain representation.

examples.title: C: Fourier Transform
examples.description: C implementation of the Fourier Transform algorithm
examples.explanation: This C code demonstrates the Fourier Transform algorithm. It applies the Fourier Transform to an image and prints the frequency domain representation.
